'''Tarsa''' was a [[Forest/Legends|forested]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Tarsa system/Legends|Tarsa system]], which was located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

{{Noncanonstart|legends=1}}
It was the site of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial relay station|relay station]] used to transmit [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] orders across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The station was destroyed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], after he escaped Imperial custody on the planet. Tarsa was home to swarms of huge [[Alessian terror moth]]s.
{{Noncanonend}}

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
While Tarsa was a planet according to the later and more canon [[The Essential Atlas|Essential Atlas]], [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda's]] dialogue in [[Star Wars: Yoda Stories|''Star Wars: Yoda Stories'']] refers to a forest moon of Tarsa.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Yoda Stories]]'' {{Nc}}
